control_awareness: This action triggers the system-enforced amount-based approval control requiring department head level approval due to amount exceeding 1,000,000. Segregation of duties and pre-PO approval controls will also apply.
expected_control_effect: Ensures appropriate approvals are captured before purchase order issuance, maintaining compliance while prioritizing delivery speed.
overall_reason: Given the urgent delivery deadline and the need for fast approval, the most direct and auditable action is to create the purchase request now with the full amount and normal routing. This respects all system-enforced controls and avoids delay, minimizing approval lead time while ensuring compliance.
reason: To secure the quarter-end analytics service package quickly and meet the customer delivery deadline by initiating the purchase request immediately with the full amount needed.
